creator: nick@nickwithers.com
text:
Update sysutils/downtime from 0.2.1 to 0.2.2.

Changes:
  - Fix a regression introduced in 0.1.3: Warn the user when they don't appear to have the permissions required to launch shutdown(8)
  - Updated the DownTime man page to be more informative / useful

Fix: PORTNAME=      downtime
-PORTVERSION=   0.2.1
+PORTVERSION=   0.2.2
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.nickwithers.com/downtime/
